ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Flexlink AB återfinns i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot. Mottagaren Hop Long Technology JSC identifieras i fakturans leveransadress. Varubeskrivning, kvantiteter och samtliga ursprungsländer kan verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
warnings: Invoice Address is FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd (Malaysia), not the certificate consignor FlexLink AB (Sweden). However, FlexLink AB appears in the invoice footer on every page, satisfying rule 4.1.0.

Consignee in certificate is 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' while invoice Shipping Address says 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' — matched via abbreviation JSC = Joint Stock Co. (rule 4.1.3.6 equivalent for consignee).
Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number. Verification proceeds on all checkpoint-level rules.

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Original on page 1, Copy on pages 2-3.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, 6 pages, clear and fully legible.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'C024.10400-1' in box 5 is a project/order reference, not an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit' is present.

Criterion 3: Consignee 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' identified in invoice Shipping Address as 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.'

checkpoints.invoice_value: FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden (footer on all pages)

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Flexlink AB' anywhere in invoice documents.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND in invoice footer on all 6 pages: 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The Invoice Address field lists 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia, but the consignor name 'FlexLink AB' is explicitly present in the footer.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice footer: 'Sweden'. IBAN prefix GB (UK bank), VAT prefix PL (Poland). However, the explicit footer address states 'Sweden' which is a direct country match.
comparison_steps.result: Country Sweden explicitly stated in invoice footer address block.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer on all pages with matching address and country.
Country check – Sweden explicitly stated in footer.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Flexlink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05, Göteborg, Sweden'. The invoice's Invoice Address is 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia — a different legal entity. However, per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name 'FlexLink AB' is searched for across ALL invoice pages. It is found in the footer of every page: 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Name matches exactly after case normalization ('Flexlink AB' = 'FlexLink AB'). Address: 'Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05' matches. City: 'Göteborg' vs 'Gothenburg' — these are the Swedish and English names for the same city, a minor spelling variation. Country: Sweden = Sweden. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH; no need to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential checks.
checkpoints.motivation: Consignor 'Flexlink AB' med adress i Göteborg, Sweden identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans sidfot på samtliga sidor som 'FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden'. Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer exakt efter normalisering. MATCH via regel 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor should match invoice address 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.1.0 allows consignor to differ from invoice address if the consignor name is explicitly found elsewhere in the invoice. FlexLink AB is found in footer.

checkpoints.certificate_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC, 2nd Floor, Tower A Mandarin Garden 2, No 99 Tan Mai Street, Tuong Mai Ward, 10000 HA NOI CITY, VIETNAM
checkpoints.invoice_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO., 2ND FLOOR, TOWER A MANDARIN GARDEN 2, NO. 99, TAN MAI STREET, TUONG MAI WARD, 117000 HANOI CITY (Shipping Address)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has 'Invoice Address: FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' (primary billing field) and 'Shipping Address: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' (secondary delivery field). Per 4.2.0.2, the primary billing field has priority.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate consignee 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' does NOT match the Invoice Address party 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD'. Certificate consignee IS found in the Shipping Address field. Applying Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3).

comparison_steps.description: Check if all conditions for Ship-To exception are met: (1) Certificate consignee 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' can be identified in invoice Ship-To field as 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' — JSC is a standard abbreviation for Joint Stock Company/Co., matching via rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee. (2) Invoice Bill-To is 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' — a different party (group company/distributor). (3) Both parties appear in the same invoice — a coherent transaction. (4) Nothing in the invoice contradicts that Hop Long Technology is the actual end recipient of the goods.
comparison_steps.result: All four conditions of 4.2.0.3 are met. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' vs 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' — JSC = Joint Stock Company = Joint Stock Co. This is a legal form abbreviation.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via legal form abbreviation (rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee per 4.2 instructions).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: VIETNAM. Invoice Shipping Address does not explicitly state 'Vietnam' but contains 'HANOI CITY'. However, the certificate address includes '10000 HA NOI CITY, VIETNAM' and the invoice shows '117000 HANOI CITY'. The invoice page 1 text also mentions delivery to 'NOI BAI INTL AIRPORT, VN' (VN = Vietnam). Country is identifiable.
comparison_steps.result: Vietnam identifiable from 'VN' in delivery terms and city 'HANOI CITY'.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To-regel – Certificate issued for end recipient (Ship-To party) while invoice is billed to a different group entity.
Legal form abbreviation – JSC = Joint Stock Co. (applied to consignee).
Country check – Vietnam identified via 'VN' in delivery terms and 'HANOI CITY'.

evidence.raw_text: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC, 2nd Floor, Tower A Mandarin Garden 2, No 99 Tan Mai Street, Tuong Mai Ward, 10000 HA NOI CITY, VIETNAM
HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO., 2ND FLOOR, TOWER A MANDARIN GARDEN 2, NO. 99, TAN MAI STREET, TUONG MAI WARD, 117000 HANOI CITY
CIP Carriage and insurance paid to NOI BAI INTL AIRPORT, VN

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' in Vietnam. Invoice Address (primary billing) is 'FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD' in Malaysia — different entity. Invoice Shipping Address is 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' in Hanoi. Per 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel), the certificate is issued for the end recipient of the goods. All four conditions are met: (1) 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' matches 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' via legal form abbreviation JSC = Joint Stock Co. (rule 4.1.3.6). (2) Bill-To is a different entity (FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd). (3) Both appear in the same invoice. (4) No contradiction. Country: 'VIETNAM' matches 'VN' in delivery terms. Postal code differs (10000 vs 117000) but per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match.
checkpoints.motivation: Mottagaren 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' identifieras i fakturans leveransadress som 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' JSC är en vedertagen förkortning av Joint Stock Company/Co. (regel 4.1.3.6). Ship-To-regeln (4.2.0.3) tillämpas då certifikatet är utfärdat för slutmottagaren medan fakturan är ställd till ett annat koncernbolag. Land: Vietnam identifieras via 'VN' i leveransvillkoren. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee should match Invoice Address party FLEXLINK ENGINEERING SDN BHD
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel) applies: COO certificates are regularly issued for the end recipient of goods, not the billing intermediary. All four conditions for the Ship-To exception are met.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate heading: 'CONVEYOR PARTS'. Invoice project line: 'Units of X180 conveyor with (39m)'. While the exact phrase 'CONVEYOR PARTS' does not appear in the invoice, the article number verification (Priority 1) has already established MATCH. Text matching is Priority 2 and not needed when Priority 1 succeeds.

Certificate has multiple origins and lists country codes per article line (PL, DK, SE, DE, EE, CZ, CN). Each article has a country code suffix. Invoice has 'CoO:' field per line item. Mapping is explicit in both documents.
comparison_steps.result: Country codes per article are explicit in the certificate via 2-letter codes after each item. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number verification. All 21 article numbers in the certificate can be exactly identified in the invoice.
Mixed origins – country codes assigned per article line in certificate and per CoO field in invoice.

evidence.raw_text: Items 10-260 across pages 1-6 with matching article numbers

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate lists 21 items with explicit article numbers. Using Priority 1 (article number matching), each article number was searched in the invoice. All 21 were found with exact article number matches. The descriptions also match (Plain bend, Conveyor beam, Slide rail, etc.). XBCB LA180 appears as one line in the certificate with 7 PCS, while in the invoice it appears as 6 separate lines (items 30-80) with different FLXC-prefix configuration codes but all showing 'XBCB LA180' — the article number matches. The descriptions in the invoice match the descriptions in the certificate for each item. Rule 4.3.7 is satisfied as each article in the certificate has an explicit 2-letter country code suffix (PL, SE, DK, DE, EE, CZ, CN) and the invoice has 'CoO:' per line item.
checkpoints.motivation: Samtliga 21 artikelnummer i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturan (Prioritet 1, regel 4.3.2). Varubeskrivningarna per artikel överensstämmer. Koppling vara–ursprungsland framgår via landskoder per artikel i certifikatet och CoO-fält per rad i fakturan (regel 4.3.7). MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Per-item PCS: XBBP 45A180R10: 2, XBCB 3A180: 9, XBCB LA180: 7, XBCR 25 H: 10, XBEB A180: 3, XBEJ A180: 3, XBMR 170: 1, XBTP 3A180 K: 26, XLAG 5: 250, XLRD 36 Q: 66, XLRE 15: 20, XLRF 64 Q: 66, XLRJ 100: 28, XLRK 65 HQ: 66, XLRL 110 VQ: 66, XLRS 3X15: 28, XLRT 3X33 D: 28, XLRZ Q: 140, XMMJ 6: 1, XSCJ 6X160: 40, 3920500: 1

comparison_steps.description: Verify each article's PCS quantity in certificate against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Direct matches for 20 of 21 items. XBCB LA180 requires summation (7 PCS across 6 invoice lines).
comparison_steps.outcome: Partial — proceed to 3D for XBCB LA180

comparison_steps.description: XBBP 45A180R10: cert 2 PCS = inv 2 PC ✓ | XBCB 3A180: cert 9 PCS = inv 9 PC ✓ | XBCR 25 H: cert 10 PCS = inv 10 PC ✓ | XBEB A180: cert 3 PCS = inv 3 PC ✓ | XBEJ A180: cert 3 PCS = inv 3 PC ✓ | XBMR 170: cert 1 PCS = inv 1 PC ✓ | XBTP 3A180 K: cert 26 PCS = inv 26 PC ✓ | XLAG 5: cert 250 PCS = inv 250 PC ✓ | XLRD 36 Q: cert 66 PCS = inv 66 PC ✓ | XLRE 15: cert 20 PCS = inv 20 PC ✓ | XLRF 64 Q: cert 66 PCS = inv 66 PC ✓ | XLRJ 100: cert 28 PCS = inv 28 PC ✓ | XLRK 65 HQ: cert 66 PCS = inv 66 PC ✓ | XLRL 110 VQ: cert 66 PCS = inv 66 PC ✓ | XLRS 3X15: cert 28 PCS = inv 28 PC ✓ | XLRT 3X33 D: cert 28 PCS = inv 28 PC ✓ | XLRZ Q: cert 140 PCS = inv 140 PC ✓ | XMMJ 6: cert 1 PCS = inv 1 PC ✓ | XSCJ 6X160: cert 40 PCS = inv 40 PC ✓ | 3920500: cert 1 PCS = inv 1 PC ✓
Certificate: XBCB LA180, 7 PCS. Invoice: 6 separate lines (items 30-80) each showing 'XBCB LA180' with quantities 2+1+1+1+1+1 = 7 PC. Same article, same invoice, same unit (PC).
comparison_steps.result: Sum = 7, matches certificate's 7 PCS exactly. Within tolerance.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – 20 of 21 items directly matched per-line.
Undantag 3D – Summation of XBCB LA180 across 6 invoice lines (2+1+1+1+1+1=7) matches certificate's 7 PCS.

evidence.raw_text: Per-line PC quantities across 26 invoice lines (items 10-260)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 lists per-item PCS quantities for 21 articles. Invoice lists 26 line items (XBCB LA180 is split into 6 configuration variants). For 20 of 21 articles, the quantity matches directly on a single invoice line. For XBCB LA180 (cert: 7 PCS), the invoice has 6 lines (items 30-80: FLXC4247795 through FLXC4247800), each showing 'XBCB LA180' as the article, with quantities 2+1+1+1+1+1=7 PC. Undantag 3D applies: same article, same invoice, same unit, sum matches exactly. Unit normalization: PCS (cert) vs PC (inv) — standard abbreviation variation, both mean pieces. All quantities verified. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Samtliga 21 artiklar i certifikatet kan kvantitetsverifieras mot fakturan. 20 artiklar matchar direkt per rad. XBCB LA180 (7 PCS) verifieras via summering av 6 fakturarader (2+1+1+1+1+1=7 PC) enligt undantag 3D (regel 4.4.5.5). MATCH.

evidence.raw_text: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 lists 7 origins: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic. The invoice has explicit 'CoO:' per line item covering all 7 countries. Each article's per-item origin code in the certificate (PL, SE, DK, DE, EE, CZ, CN) corresponds to the CoO stated on the matching invoice line. Poland = PL (items 10-80 plain bend/conveyor beams, item 110 idler end unit, item 130 plain chain). Sweden = SE (items 100 end drive unit, 120 mounting tool, 160 end plug, 180 connecting sleeve, 210 straight guide rail, 220 guide rail cover, 260 drill fixture). Germany = DE (item 140 plastic screw). Denmark = DK (item 90 slide rail). Estonia = EE (items 150 spacer, 170 guide rail bracket support, 190 guide rail clamp, 200 guide rail clamp support, 230 plug). China = CN (item 250 connecting strip). Czech Republic = CZ (item 240 pin insert tool). No non-listed origins found in invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Samtliga 7 ursprungsländer i certifikatet (Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic) kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturans CoO-fält per artikelrad. Per-artikel-koppling vara–ursprungsland är konsistent mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Inga motstridiga ursprungsuppgifter förekommer. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: FlexLink AB, Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Gothenburg, Sweden (sidfot alla sidor)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – Consignor-namnet identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans sidfot.
sections.motivation: Flexlink AB identifieras i fakturans sidfot på samtliga sidor med matchande adress och land (Sweden). Fakturans Invoice Address-fält anger ett annat koncernbolag (FlexLink Engineering Sdn Bhd, Malaysia), men regel 4.1.0 tillåter att consignor identifieras var som helst i fakturan.

sections.certificate_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC, 2nd Floor, Tower A Mandarin Garden 2, No 99 Tan Mai Street, Tuong Mai Ward, 10000 HA NOI CITY, VIETNAM
sections.invoice_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO., 2ND FLOOR, TOWER A MANDARIN GARDEN 2, NO. 99, TAN MAI STREET, TUONG MAI WARD, 117000 HANOI CITY (Shipping Address)
sections.rule_applied: Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) + förkortning av juridisk bolagsform (4.1.3.6): JSC = Joint Stock Co.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' identifieras i fakturans leveransadress som 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.' JSC är förkortning för Joint Stock Company. Ship-To-regeln tillämpas då certifikatet avser slutmottagaren medan fakturan är ställd till ett koncernbolag. Land: Vietnam bekräftas via VN i leveransvillkoren.

sections.rule_applied: Prioritet 1 – Artikelnummerverifiering (4.3.2). Samtliga 21 artikelnummer identifierade exakt.
sections.motivation: Alla 21 artikelnummer i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturan via Prioritet 1 (artikelnummermatchning). Varubeskrivningar per artikel (Plain bend, Conveyor beam, Slide rail etc.) överensstämmer. Koppling vara–ursprungsland är explicit i båda dokumenten.

sections.invoice_value: Per-rad PC-kvantiteter (26 rader, XBCB LA180 uppdelad i 6 konfigurationsvarianter)
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) för 20 artiklar + Undantag 3D summering (4.4.5.5) för XBCB LA180.
sections.motivation: 20 av 21 artiklar kvantitetsverifieras direkt per fakturrad. XBCB LA180 (certifikat: 7 PCS) verifieras via summering av 6 fakturarader (2+1+1+1+1+1=7 PC) enligt undantag 3D. Samtliga kvantiteter överensstämmer exakt.

sections.certificate_value: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic
sections.invoice_value: CoO per artikelrad: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic
sections.rule_applied: Positiv verifiering (4.5.5) – samtliga 7 ursprungsländer identifierade via explicita CoO-fält i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Alla 7 ursprungsländer i certifikatet kan identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans CoO-fält. Per-artikel-koppling är konsistent: samma artikel har samma ursprungsland i båda dokumenten. Inga motstridiga eller oförklarade ursprungsuppgifter förekommer.
